reviews.review_description:
Love this, but think after three dinosaurs skeletons, I’ve come to the end of what’s currently available :(
Really hope there will be more added soon 😊

reviews.review_title: Childhood dream of dinosaurs in XR
reviews.review_description:
I've always wanted to build dinosaur skeletons in mixed reality and this game finally lets me do it. The dinos also animate and can be scaled up to fill my living room. Now that's something!
Gave it to my niece too and she loves it and can't put it down so it's kid friendly.
I know it is still early access, but devs, please give us more dinosaurs!
Overall this game has huge potential, will keep my eye on it.

if you like dinosaurs this is a must have! 
you excavate fossils and put them together in a 3D puzzle and then they come alive. 
definitely worth to check out!!! 
(it's still in development but gets frequent updates)
